card.title: AI settings
card.description: Turn AI features on for this organization, set a monthly USD budget, and choose which provider answers requests.
card.enableHint: When off, every AI surface short-circuits with a friendly notice.
card.providerHint: Pick the provider whose API key is configured. Anthropic and OpenAI both handle tool calling and Latin American Spanish well.
card.modelHint: Leave blank to use the provider's default. Override when the provider publishes a newer model.
card.budgetHint: Calls refuse once this month's spend reaches the budget. Set to 0 to disable temporarily.
card.providerMissing: Provider not configured (set the API key environment variable)
